Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperial Palace (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Naberius Clayborn was assigned to the Imperial Palace for many years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Silent One used to work in the Imperial Palace.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Imperial Palace contains a tower with columns that is a hundred feet off the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Imperial Palace is a complex of buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Imperial Palace is the site of an attack by a Consultant saboteur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor's Imperial Palace takes up almost a fifth of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperial Palace was held by the Navigators and the Guard.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Palace has a roof.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Palace is a large structure in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Palace is separated from the Capital by a wall containing the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Chaos erupted in the streets of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Elderspawn can be flushed out of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Some Gardeners died in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Gardeners had fought in the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Interion Darovish prepared a carriage to take him back to the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Palace is a location where petty crimes were being subsidized to strain the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shera is positioned on an Imperial Palace roof.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Imperial Palace contains rooms that are impervious to eavesdroppers due to centuries of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Palace is a location where Tyria resides in its depths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Imperialists used tunnels to escape the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor was buried outside the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Shera travels along the red-tiled rooftops of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Norian works in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Awakened bell's ring echoed throughout the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — A conference is held in a broad conference room of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Silver-blue mist filled the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Gardeners traveled along the rooftops of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera could see from the courtyard in the Imperial Palace to miles deep in the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr was moved back to the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Palace contains a throne room.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
